mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM jobs
and title like concat('%', #{Params.title}, '%')
and location like concat('%', #{Params.location}, '%')
and category like concat('%', #{Params.category}, '%')
and type like concat('%', #{Params.type}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jobs (company_id, title, salary, description, created_at, updated_at, location, category, type, is_active) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{title}, #{salary}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{location}, #{category}, #{type}, #{isActive})
